Legal

Cookie Policy.

Last updated: 26 June 2026

Cookies are small files placed on your device when you visit a website. They let the site work, remember your choices, and help us understand how the site is used.

How you control them

On your first visit you'll see a consent banner, where you can accept or reject non-essential cookies by category. The "Manage consent" link on any page lets you change or withdraw your choices at any time. Essential cookies stay on, because the Site needs them to work.

The cookies we use

Functional (always on)

Needed for the Site to load and work, and to remember your consent choice.

Preferences

Remember choices you make, to improve your experience.

Statistics

Help us understand how visitors use the Site, so we can improve it.

Marketing

Used to measure and improve our advertising.

Tools and providers

  • Google Analytics 4 - statistics
  • Google Ads and Google Tag Manager - marketing
  • Microsoft Clarity - statistics
  • Complianz - functional (consent management)
  • HandL UTM Grabber and our enquiry forms - functional

Some providers operate outside the UK; our Privacy Policy addresses how those data transfers are protected.

Browser settings

You can also block or delete cookies in your browser settings. If you do, some parts of the Site may not work as intended.
